product.name: Voron Glass in-Channel Extra Durable Rain Guards for Ford Explorer 2011-2019, Window Deflectors, Vent Window Visors, 4 Pieces - 220116
features: CUSTOM FIT FOR FORD EXPLORER 2011–2019: Designed specifically for Ford Explorer 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019. These In-Channel window rain guards integrate seamlessly with factory window frames and are essential Ford Explorer accessories.

ALL-WEATHER AIRFLOW & COMFORT: Rain guards for car windows reduce wind noise and deflect rain, snow, and road spray while allowing fresh air circulation. Ideal Ford Explorer window visor solution for daily driving and all-weather comfort.

EXTRA-DURABLE POLYCARBONATE: Made from reinforced PC plastic, these Ford Explorer window deflectors resist cracking, warping, and fading. Streamlined vent visor design delivers long-lasting rain guards for cars with a clean OEM look.

COMPLETE 4-PIECE WINDOW VISOR SET: Includes front and rear window visors, vent window visors, and window deflectors. Perfect Ford Explorer rain guards for full side-window coverage and improved interior airflow.

EASY In-Channel INSTALLATION: In-Channel window rain guards install quickly with secure, drill-free fit. Automotive-grade mounting ensures long-term performance for Ford Explorer vent visors and window vents for cars.
